message.content:
[cron:4d1920f6-0515-4e1e-87e6-05f4ed4797bd TQP Daily Runner (fixed)] TQP_RUN: Run bash /Users/ainchorsoc2a/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/task-queue-processor.sh. No reply needed — script writes its own state. TKT-0501: if TQP escalation occurs, script uses sovereign-alert.sh (direct Bot API).
